caption: The video appears to be a live stream or recording of someone playing a sports video game, specifically focusing on the "Ultimate Team" mode. The player is navigating through the offense section of the team management interface, which is highlighted in green. The screen shows various statistics and options related to the game, such as points, coins, and levels. In the bottom left corner, there is a smaller inset showing the player, who seems to be engaged and possibly reacting to the game. The background includes a festive Christmas tree, suggesting that the video was recorded during the holiday season. The overall atmosphere is one of excitement and concentration as the player manages their team.
